MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, David G. Mendez, Defendants appearing in pro per. Parties reached an agreement, terms of settlement on record. Trial date is vacated.
